batch_result.batch:
checkpointloadersimple.ckpt_name = 'sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors'
emptylatentimage.height = 1024
emptylatentimage.width = 1024
positive_sdxl = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.clip, text_g='a crystal fox in a snowy forest', text_l='', near=ksampler)
negative_sdxl = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.clip, text_g='text, watermark', text_l='', near=ksampler)
ksampler.positive = positive_sdxl.CONDITIONING
ksampler.negative = negative_sdxl.CONDITIONING
ksampler_2.positive = positive_sdxl.CONDITIONING
ksampler_2.negative = negative_sdxl.CONDITIONING
del positive
del negative
done()

response.batch:
checkpointloadersimple.ckpt_name = 'sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors'
emptylatentimage.height = 1024
emptylatentimage.width = 1024
positive_sdxl = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.clip, text_g='a crystal fox in a snowy forest', text_l='', near=ksampler)
negative_sdxl = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.clip, text_g='text, watermark', text_l='', near=ksampler)
ksampler.positive = positive_sdxl.CONDITIONING
ksampler.negative = negative_sdxl.CONDITIONING
ksampler_2.positive = positive_sdxl.CONDITIONING
ksampler_2.negative = negative_sdxl.CONDITIONING
del positive
